title: Chapter 76
content:

Lyssel recovered with terrifying speed, political efficiency taking over once more.

She smoothed her skirts, straightened her collar, and repinned her honey-blonde hair in under thirty seconds.

Picking up her bag, she paused at the door, voice suddenly cool and professional again.

"The Empress has a daughter. Relevant diplomatic context. She’s been kept strictly out of public view for three years. The court claims illness. The actual reason is... complicated."

She met his eyes.

"You should know this before you walk into that meeting."

"Why?" Kane asked, still catching his breath as he adjusted his belt.

"Because the Empress is going to offer you something. And that something is her daughter. And the daughter will be the most politically significant person in that room, even if she doesn’t say a single word."

She pulled the iron handle and opened the door.

Lyssel left without looking back.

A hidden daughter.

An empire of older women about to use her as the ultimate bargaining chip.

Two hours later, the strike team rode out through the gates of Sylvandar.

Speed mattered far more than numbers for this mission, so Kane left the bulk of his army behind.

Thirty Bloodfang warriors remained at the newly claimed manor under Davan’s strict command, while the other forty maintained their hidden watch inside the border forest.

Only eighteen people made the journey.

Riding near the front, Kane led a specialized group consisting of Thora, Sira, Kessa, Rutheus, Grieselda, Brak, Lirael, Caelindra, Lyssel, and six of his absolute best tribal fighters wearing their new iron-alloy plate.

Two Knights of Elfheim appeared at the manor gates without being summoned and silently fell into an escort formation.

Nobody bothered to question their sudden presence, since everyone understood they were the queen’s personal eyes on this mission, and the queen certainly knew it.

’Let her watch,’ Kane mused, adjusting the leather reins in his hands.

’She needs to see how a real king operates. How I take what I want, bend highborn warriors over and fuck them until their legs shake. Let the Empress and her hidden little daughter watch me claim every hole as I own them. I’ll show them what a true king does.’

Unlike elves, it’s not easy to reason them.

And there’s no need to hold back anymore.
